hero.title: Ilayda Süleymanoğlu
hero.subtitle: Energy Analyst Working Student @ Pure Energy || 3rd year @ Istanbul Technical University
hero.about: A passionate researcher deeply interested in progress and innovation. An active advocate for global development goals, particularly gender equality. My academic and personal interests center on solid-state physics, climate studies, and developing accessible technologies. I aim to contribute to sustainable solutions by combining knowledge and experience in these fields.
hero.scoreDesc: These scores reflect that I am extremely organized, responsible, and success-oriented, while also being highly curious and creative about new ideas and experiences.

responsibilities: In-depth learning of intraday and day-ahead electricity markets, Turkish sustainability regulations
Power plant optimization and management, mastery of hourly trading volumes and econometric parameters
AI-powered forecasting and prediction using machine learning tools for plant optimization
Expertise in trading concepts: IREC, OTC, origination, and Market Clearing Price (MCP)
Energy forecasting with AI and ML models
Participating in ITU SEED Acceleration Program
Developed strong communication and organizational skills
Built calm and peaceful personality traits
Served with dedication while balancing studies
Made significant personal efforts to meet physical requirements
Also worked as: Barista, Security Personnel, Event Hostess
Learned the true value of hard work and dedication
Developed attention to detail after a crucial lesson about reading instructions carefully

education.title: Education & Academic Background
education.intro: My educational journey spanning meteorology engineering, computer programming, and international exchange experiences has shaped my vision for data-driven atmospheric analysis, sustainable energy solutions, and accessible software development.
